title: Create the Modpack
description: All about Create. One of the biggest Create Modpacks!!
body:
## Welcome to **Create the Modpack** _Explorer the Steam_

In this Modpack you're in the year 1840 and you have to build huge fabrics to automate everything. You start with nothing and later you automate diamonds. Then you build trains and frogports to transport item about long distances. And then you... (_Okay maybe I shouldn't write so much about one topic_)

(_Let's go on_) You complete the Quests (_with this **Quests** also Create noobs can play this Modpack_) (_shouldn't I spoiler the Quests? - Okay I write it in an Spoiler_)


<details>
<summary>and there is the Spoiler</summary>

1. you complete all quests
2. then you build the shipyard
3. Now then you build the airship
4. Now you completed it 
5. and now you can play part two of Create the Modpack (coming soon)

</details>

# 

<details>
<summary>This modpack is for:</summary>

- Anyone who likes Create
- Anyone who has played Minecraft many times
- who likes Adventures
- Anyone who finds Redstone too boring
- Anyone who likes relaxed gaming
- Anyone who wants to try something new
- those who simply want to play together for a long time

</details>


# 


And this modpack is just at the beginning of its development.

<details>
<summary>Future features coming soon:</summary>

- Own title screen
- A story mode with quests focused on Create (I will finish it with the next update)
- (More mods(_if I find more_))

</details>



**_Make sure_**:
- that flywheel client is on (config/flywheel.client)
- You can use this modpack in videos or on severs but please link the modpack(when you only      play with friends you haven't to link it)
- I didn't have to do something with the creators!

(This modpack contains the most popular Create mods, Yung's structers mod series, the [let's do] mod series, and many more.) (_I thought it's to boring so I write it here_)
